case_title: CLARITA NORMA TUMANAK VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUMANAK, CLARITA NORMA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CLARITA NORMA TUMUNAK IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED TAGALOG COURT INTERPRETER KARENNA CASTRO. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMANDA ABRAHAMSON (RELOCATION SUPERVISOR) AND EVELYN CATALAN (SR. DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY OPERATIONS). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/SIGNED BY LINE** SERVED NOV-12-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUMANAK, CLARITA NORMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TUMANAK, CLARITA NORMA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
NOTICE OF APPEAL **UNTIMELY** FILED BY APPELLANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. MAILED TO RESPONDENT TUMANAK, CLARITA NORMA
